code:
sequenceDiagram participant User participant Claude participant fspec reverse participant Session File participant Project Files User->>Claude: I have legacy code, need specs Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse fspec reverse->>Session File: Create .reverse-session.json fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for feature files fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for test files fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for implementation fspec reverse->>Session File: Save analysis results fspec reverse->>Claude:
Analysis complete
Found gaps Claude->>User: Found 3 test files without features User->>Claude: Let's do Strategy A Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --strategy=A fspec reverse->>Session File: Set strategy=A, phase=executing fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 1/3 guidance
Read test file... Claude->>Project Files: Read src/__tests__/legacy.test.ts Claude->>fspec reverse: (Retail_CouponSystem) Claude->>fspec reverse: (Retail_OrderManagement) Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --continue fspec reverse->>Session File: Increment currentStep to 2 fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 2/3 guidance
Next file... Note over Claude,fspec reverse: Repeat for each gap Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --continue fspec reverse->>Session File: Increment currentStep to 3 fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 3/3 guidance
Final file... Claude->>fspec reverse: (Retail_PointOfSale) Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --complete fspec reverse->>Session File: Validate all work done fspec reverse->>Session File: Delete session file fspec reverse->>Claude:
Session complete
All gaps filled Claude->>User: ✅ Reverse ACDD complete
repo_description: fspec is the holy grail: a complete spec-driven system that shepherds AI through professional Gherkin scenarios, auto-generates tests from Given/When/Then criteria, enforces TDD discipline, and links

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们有一批遗留代码需要逆向生成规格文档。我想让Claude来协调这个流程，首先用户把需求传给Claude，然后触发fspec reverse模块来处理。
明白。那fspec reverse一开始需要创建会话状态吧？我给它加一个Session File参与者，让它先创建.reverse-session.json来跟踪进度。
对，同时让它扫描Project Files里的feature文件、test文件和implementation代码。扫描完成后把分析结果存回Session File。
好的，我画上了扫描流程。然后Claude收到system-reminder，提示分析完成并发现 gaps，再反馈给用户说找到了3个没有对应feature的test文件。
用户选择Strategy A继续，Claude传给fspec reverse执行--strategy=A。这时候Session File要更新状态为strategy=A, phase=executing。
这里分步骤执行对吧？第一步Claude读取src/__tests__/legacy.test.ts，然后和fspec reverse交互处理Retail_CouponSystem和Retail_OrderManagement这两个模块？
没错，然后执行--continue进入第二步，Session File把currentStep递增到2。我需要在Claude和fspec reverse之间加一个注释，说明要对每个gap重复这个流程。
加上了Note。继续第三步处理Retail_PointOfSale，然后执行--complete，Session File验证所有工作完成并删除会话文件，最后Claude通知用户Reverse ACDD完成。
